top_items.title: Accelerating innovation and impact across the public sector
top_items.one_liner: Google Cloud is enabling public sector innovation at scale with Gemini Enterprise and AI solutions.

top_items.title: QueryData helps agents turn natural language into queries for AlloyDB, Cloud SQL and Spanner
top_items.one_liner: QueryData translates natural language to SQL for AlloyDB, Cloud SQL, and Spanner, enhancing agent capabilities.

top_items.title: Raising the security baseline: Essential AI and cloud security now on by default
top_items.one_liner: Google Cloud now offers essential AI and cloud security protections by default to strengthen AI rollouts.
